description: You are a fitness club manager. Log into wger at http://localhost (username: admin, password: adminadmin) and create a new user group named 'Personal Trainers' in the Django Administration panel. Assign exactly these three permissions: 'exercises | exercise | Can add exercise', 'exercises | exercise | Can change exercise', and 'exercises | exercise | Can view exercise'. Do not assign any other permissions, specifically excluding 'exercises | exercise | Can delete exercise'.
